creator: n.diablo.n.f@list.ru
text: After the last update of kf5 to 5.70.1 and plasma5-plasma to 5.19.1, some widgets started working, but not all of them and very strange. Tab "Sensor Details" still does not work. Sometimes I cannot change "Display style". It either unavailable or does not work. Widget "Memory usage" does not work. But new widgets very cool!
